_help:
Sample mcp-clients.json that wires joe to ghostloop's robot MCP server.
Copy to ~/.joe-agent/mcp-clients.json, edit the path, then run `joe mcp reload`.
ghostloop's policy pipeline (geofence, force-cap, HITL gates) still gates every
intent joe emits, so joe can drive the robot but cannot bypass safety.

servers.name: ghostloop
servers._help: Other profiles: turtlebot, spot, tello, stretch, humanoid_demo, or path/to/your_robot.yaml. Other backends: mock, mujoco (needs ghostloop[mujoco]), ros2 (needs ROS 2 humble + ghostloop[ros2]).
